title: 'Dustrial Decor Fabric
description: Adds industrial-looking blocks for your mega-factories.
body: #### This is a **Fabric** port of the [original](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dustrial-decor) by BlueDuckYT ___ Although **'Dustrial Decor** is aimed to spice up builds relating to factories, industrial buildings, etc., We're sure you can find uses for them outside of the more darker-themed builds. Get creative! This mod includes: - **Padding Block-Set**: This fluffy block-set has bouncy properties, and is great for decorating! It goes especially well with asylum-like builds, but can also be used in other creative ways. - **Chain Link Fences**: Similar to iron bars, made with chains. It also goes well with the padded blocks. And, what makes it unique from other fences/bars, is that... it's **climbable!** But watch out for the barbed variant; it is climbable as well, but very sharp! - **Barbed Iron Bars**: I don't wanna say 'I told you so', but see, they're sharp. - **Industrial Iron Blocks**: Made with coal and iron, these dark metallic blocks will spice up your factory, with multiple variants. - **Sheet Metal Blocks**: This set has similar colors to iron bars, and is made using sheet metal. It comes with many variants, each of which has a **rusty variant** as well! - **Cinder Block**: A falling-block that is great for decoration. - **Cardboard Blocks**: Cardboard is a new material made from paper, and it can be used to make a set of light brown-colored blocks, including cardboard boxes! - **Large Chains and Golden Chains**: Coming with an assortment of decorations, large chains (along with a golden variant) can be used for metallic dungeon-like builds! - **Large Lanterns**: Large Lanterns come in 5 variants of lanterns, and are full-block light sources! - **Neon Lights**: Coming in 8 colors, Neon Lights are a great way to spice up futuristic builds with a unique light source. Blacklights are also available! --- Check these out in action in the Gallery, or even better... in your world! XD --- PS: Vertical Slabs are available but disabled in the configs by default. You can **enable** them if you're an OG builder! ### If you are considering supporting me, buy me a coffee! --- [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/N4N26I5X3)
